properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: I will lift up my head I will worship now I will say that the Lord is Worthy to be praised :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You revive me Forever, and ever You revive me Forever, and ever more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will not be ashamed Of Your mighty name, yeah Jesus the Son of God Is worthy of the praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will not be ashamed (no, no) Of Your mighty name Jesus the Son of God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Forever I give You praise Forever I shout Your name Whatever You want me to do Lord I'm here for You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Forever I sing and dance Forever I take the chance Wherever You want me to go
